cathedral.example: The old cathedral has tall windows.
cathedral.example_zh: 那座古老的大教堂有高高的窗戶。

caution.example: Handle the hot pan with caution.
The sign cautions drivers to slow down.

cautious.example: She is cautious when crossing the street.

cemetery.example: Flowers were placed in the cemetery.

certainty.example: There is no certainty about the weather.
certainty.example_zh: 天氣沒有什麼是確定的。

certificate.example: She received a certificate for the course.
certificate.example_zh: 她拿到了這門課的結業證書。

chaos.example: The room was in complete chaos.

chapel.example: They prayed quietly in the small chapel.
chapel.example_zh: 他們在小教堂裡靜靜地禱告。

chef.example: The chef prepared a delicious meal.
chef.example_zh: 主廚準備了一頓美味的餐點。

choir.example: She sings in the school choir.

chord.example: He played a soft chord on the guitar.
chord.example_zh: 他在吉他上彈了一個柔和的和弦。

chore.example: Washing dishes is a daily chore.

chronic.example: He suffers from chronic back pain.

chubby.example: The baby has chubby little cheeks.
chubby.example_zh: 寶寶有胖嘟嘟的小臉頰。

chunk.example: She cut a big chunk of cheese.

cite.example: Please cite the source of your information.

citizenship.example: He applied for citizenship in his new country.
citizenship.example_zh: 他申請了新國家的公民身分。

clarity.example: She explained the rule with clarity.
clarity.example_zh: 她把規則解釋得很清楚。

clause.example: Read every clause of the contract.
clause.example_zh: 仔細讀合約的每一條款。

clause.example: A sentence can have two clauses.
clause.example_zh: 一個句子可以有兩個子句。

cling.example: The child clung to her mother's hand.
cling.example_zh: 那孩子緊抓著媽媽的手。

clinical.example: The new drug passed its clinical test.
clinical.example_zh: 這款新藥通過了臨床試驗。

cluster.example: A cluster of stars shone in the sky.

cocaine.example: Cocaine is a dangerous and illegal drug.
cocaine.example_zh: 古柯鹼是危險的非法毒品。

coffin.example: The coffin was made of dark wood.
coffin.example_zh: 那口棺材是用深色木頭做的。

cognitive.example_zh: 益智遊戲能增進認知能力。

coherent.example: She gave a clear and coherent answer.
coherent.example_zh: 她給了一個清楚又有條理的回答。

coincidence.example: Meeting you here is a happy coincidence.
coincidence.example_zh: 在這裡遇見你真是個美好的巧合。

collaboration.example: The book was a collaboration of two writers.
collaboration.example_zh: 這本書是兩位作家合作的成果。

collective.example: It was a collective effort by the whole team.
The farm is run by a collective.
collective.example_zh: 這座農場由一個合作團體經營。

collector.example: He is a collector of old stamps.

colonial.example: The town has many colonial buildings.
colonial.example_zh: 這座城鎮有許多殖民時期的建築。

columnist-n-combat.example: The columnist wrote about city life.
columnist-n-combat.example_zh: 那位專欄作家寫城市生活。

comedian.example: The comedian made the whole room laugh.
comedian.example_zh: 那位諧星把全場逗笑了。

commentary.example: He gave a lively commentary on the game.
commentary.example_zh: 他為比賽做了生動的實況報導。

commentator.example_zh: 評論員描述了每一個動作。

commission.example: The salesman earns a commission on each sale.
commission.example_zh: 業務員每筆交易都抽佣金。
一個委員會研究了這個問題。

communism.example: Students studied the idea of communism.
communism.example_zh: 學生研究共產主義的概念。

communist.example: He read about a communist country in history.
communist.example_zh: 他讀到歷史上一個共產主義國家。

communist.example: Her grandfather was once a communist.

commute.example: She commutes to work by train.

commuter.example: The train was full of tired commuters.
commuter.example_zh: 火車上擠滿了疲憊的通勤族。

compact.example: The small car is compact and easy to park.

comparable.example: The two phones are comparable in price.

compassion.example: She treats the sick with compassion.

compassionate.example: The nurse is gentle and compassionate.
compassionate.example_zh: 那名護理師溫柔又有同情心。

compatible.example: This printer is compatible with my computer.
compatible.example_zh: 這台印表機和我的電腦相容。

compel.example: Bad weather compelled us to stay home.
compel.example_zh: 壞天氣迫使我們待在家。

compensate.example: The company will compensate her for the loss.

compensation.example: He received compensation for his injury.

competence.example: She showed great competence at her job.
competence.example_zh: 她在工作上展現了很強的能力。

competent.example: He is a competent and reliable worker.
competent.example_zh: 他是個能幹又可靠的員工。

complexity.example: The complexity of the problem surprised us.
complexity.example_zh: 這問題的複雜程度令我們驚訝。

compliance.example: Compliance with the rules is required.

complication.example: A small complication delayed the trip.
complication.example_zh: 一個小狀況耽誤了行程。

complication.example: The illness led to serious complications.
complication.example_zh: 這個病引發了嚴重的併發症。
